title: navarretia × helleri
intro: Navarretia × helleri, also known as Heller's navarretia, is a rare and unique plant species that is a hybrid of Navarretia leucotricha and Navarretia divaricata, both members of the phlox family. The plant has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential candidate for medicinal use. Navarretia × helleri has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, and its extracts have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Navarretia × helleri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
